---
name: Build Feature
description: Add a new feature — describe what users should be able to do and get a plan
agent: build
argument-hint: What should users be able to do? (e.g., share a grocery list, rate recipes)
---

I want to add a new feature to the recipes app.

**The idea:** ${1:describe what users should be able to do}

Research the existing codebase to understand where this fits, then show me:

1. What the user experience will look like (step by step)
2. What you need to create (components, APIs, stores, tests)
3. Key design decisions and why

Don't write any code yet — just show me the plan so I can approve it.
